observation_points.description: The complete declared vignette input is accepted and the prior prefix is snapshotted before any current-access projection is read.
The bounded initial admission/access window closes; access may be absent, unobserved, or unmapped.
The bounded initial encounter-formation window closes without certifying actual qualia.
The bounded adjudication window closes; no world result or durable write follows automatically.
An elicited immediate utterance or action is recorded if the later source-specific protocol actually observes one; the 001A design anchor is not an observation.
One registered future option is applied identically to both prior paths and the pre-probe prefix is snapshotted.
One bounded later admission/access opportunity closes; presentation does not certify access.
The bounded later candidate, adjudication, and non-durable reorganization projection window closes.
A later utterance or action is recorded only if the source-specific protocol observes one.

relation_vocabulary.meaning: The compared projection is equal by design or by the conditional placement definition; this is not an empirical finding.
The placement is computationally defined to differ here; this is not a correct human answer.
A registered upstream difference may propagate here, but direct residence is not asserted.
The declared operational factor record differs by fixture construction, independently of any placement.
A claim-scoped external assessment may differ because the public history or stimulus record differs; no subjective trace is granted Evidence authority.
The forbidden cast or writer output must be absent in both compared arms.
The evidence-assessment relation is not evaluated until a separate claim-scoped reassessment policy is frozen.
The projection is structurally outside this contrast or target scope.

observation_vocabulary.meaning: The frozen source-specific measurement mapping returned equality.
The frozen source-specific measurement mapping returned a difference.
The protocol did not observe or could not map this field; this is not equality or zero.
The field does not apply under the registered scope.

probe_options: At a new access, the same prior-material cue used in the initial cell is re-presented while the recipient reports an ordinary current mood; no new partner utterance, behavior, or external target evidence is added.

At a new access, the same prior-material cue used in the initial cell is re-presented while the recipient reports a low current mood; no new partner utterance, behavior, or external target evidence is added.
source_probe_snapshot.open_question: Would cue admission, interpretation, or delayed-reorganization trace differ between the later reported-mood options while the cue and external target record remain identical?

probe_options: After revision, the evaluator identifies the corrected criteria and acknowledges improvement.
After revision, the evaluator repeats global dissatisfaction without new criteria.
source_probe_snapshot.open_question: Would at least one later access, interpretation, or action-affordance trace diverge under either event despite the same immediate surface?

probe_options: The source passes the walker and continues on another route.
The source remains behind and matches another turn taken by the walker.
source_probe_snapshot.open_question: Would at least one later observation, interpretation, or action-affordance trace differ under either event despite the same immediate precaution?

edge_classes.meaning: Tests an initial-condition residue association while the later reported mood and future option are matched.
Tests a current later-condition association while the initial cell is matched.

operational_alias_rule.definition: Two placements are OPERATIONALLY_ALIASED only when their complete conditional signatures are identical for every evaluable registered contrast and matched future branch under all required scope keys.
operational_alias_rule.durable_cache_rule: TS_TARGET_SCOPED_READOUT and TC_SLOW_CACHE_READOUT remain NOT_IDENTIFIABLE_UNDER_HORIZON H_REGISTERED_FUTURE_ACCESS_K_PLUS_1; neither OPERATIONALLY_ALIASED nor placement winner, durable-state, or global alias conclusions are permitted under the current one-future horizon.
